shakshi: Alzedroswune lands accessed through Forest's direction — the territory Hypatia came from

The specialized craft market — distinct from the Azonithian market economy the player has been operating in since 0008

Who the shipwright is among his people — the full picture of who came to the player's shop in 0008
The community elder met — reads the player as a type by rumor alone, their road legible without being known
Pythia presented as the Alzedroswune elder — her temple identity withheld until 0057
The struggle against empire is older than Pythia by thousands of years — always goes the same way with rhyming exceptions
Empires fall in ways that tell you what they couldn't do because it's against their nature — the frame for everything the player has been doing
Pythia read the player's road as kin to the struggle by rumor alone — legible without being individually known
